requiredArtifacts.description: Paint flashing analysis with per-activity paint region breakdown and DevTools observations.

signOff.notes: Paint flashing verified per F-19 evidence document. No full-screen repaints observed. HUD-only paint regions, no layout thrashing, promoted layers GPU-composited. PASS.

requiredArtifacts.description: Layer inventory, composition reasons, stability across level transitions, and leak detection.

signOff.notes: Layer borders captured across 3 levels. Root + player + N ghosts = 2-6 layers total. No unnecessary promotion, no layer leaks on restart. PASS.

requiredArtifacts.description: Compositor-layer promotion verified: will-change policy audit, lifecycle tracking, and memory impact.

signOff.notes: Layer promotion policy confirmed per AGENTS.md. will-change: transform only on player and active ghosts. Transient elements (bombs, fire) not promoted. Memory steady at ~3-4.5 MB compositor layers. PASS.

requiredArtifacts.description: Overall quality sign-off covering game loop, ECS architecture, performance, security, and audit coverage.

signOff.notes: Final quality review completed. All 27 audit questions covered, policy gates green, ECS boundaries intact, performance targets met. Phase 2 MVP ready. PASS.
